{
  "name": "personalwebsite",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "packageManager": "npm@10.9.2",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "postbuild": "next-sitemap --config next-sitemap.config.js && npm run build:resume-pdf",
    "build:resume-pdf": "tsx scripts/resume/build-pdf.ts",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint": "next lint",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:e2e": "playwright test",
    "ship-gate:projects": "tsx scripts/ship-gates/projects.ts",
    "ingest": "tsx scripts/llm/ingest.ts",

    "db:generate": "drizzle-kit generate",
    "db:migrate": "tsx scripts/llm/migrate.ts"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@mdx-js/loader": "^3.1.1",

    "fuse.js": "^7.3.0",
    "next": "^15.1.0",
    "next-sitemap": "^4.2.3",
    "pgvector": "^0.2.1",
    "postgres": "^3.4.9",
    "react": "^19.0.0",
    "react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "zod": "^4.3.6",
    "zustand": "^5.0.12"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@anthropic-ai/tokenizer": "^0.0.4",
    "@axe-core/react": "^4.11.2",
    "@playwright/test": "^1.59.1",
    "@testing-library/react": "^16.3.2",
    "@types/node": "^22.0.0",

    "vitest": "^4.1.4"
  }
}

content.text:
Typecheck clean (no errors).

## Summary

Created two files:

- `src/lib/llm/promptAssembly.ts` — `assemblePrompt()` composes persona + grounding instructions + a `<retrieved_context>` block, with token budgeting (4000 reserved for response, remainder split across persona/history/userMessage/retrieved). Retrieved chunks are sorted by score desc, fitted greedily, and dropped lowest-score-first on overflow. Returns `{ system, messages, citations, tokenBudget }` with sequential `[c1]`, `[c2]`… IDs mapping back to chunkIds.
- `src/lib/llm/promptAssembly.test.ts` — 9 tests covering: empty retrieved (no context block), sequential/unique citation IDs, score-desc ordering, overflow with 20×~1000-token chunks (low-score dropped), 20-turn history truncated to last 6, short history preserved, custom `maxContextTokens`, instruction text verbatim, and snippet behavior.

### Acceptance checks

- `test -f src/lib/llm/promptAssembly.ts` → exists
- `npx vitest run src/lib/llm/promptAssembly.test.ts` → **1 file passed, 9 tests passed**
- `npx tsc --noEmit` → clean

IMPL_RESULT: PASS
